text: Monitoring tells you what's wrong; observability lets you ask why. Three pillars: metrics (numeric time-series, counters/gauges), logs (timestamped event records), traces (end-to-end request flow across services). The 'Golden Signals': latency, traffic, errors, saturation.
SLOs (Service Level Objectives) define acceptable reliability: e.g., 99.9% availability with <100ms p99 latency.
